title: 성진 controller INPUT config (RL -> control seam)
description: The REAL entry point of 성진's controller (control_seoungjin/sample/run_and_log.py, spec'd in control_seoungjin/sample/INPUT_FORMAT.md). A waypoints + limits + dt config, YAML or JSON. THIS is where RL plugs in: the policy emits waypoints, they become this config, and 성진 plans a minimum-time trajectory through them (path_time.plan_waypoints). There is NO yaw/time/quat in the input -- yaw is auto-derived from the velocity heading downstream. 성진 itself does NO validation (KeyError on a missing key); this schema is the added RL->control safety net.

waypoints.description: Ordered [x, y, z] points to pass through, in metres, world frame +Z-up. N >= 2; the first point is the start.

items.description: A single [x, y, z] point, metres.

limits.description: Per-axis trajectory limits handed to plan_waypoints. Each is a scalar (same limit on x/y/z) OR an [x, y, z] triple (per-axis). Enforced PER-AXIS, not on the vector magnitude (INPUT_FORMAT.md) -- a diagonal move can exceed the scalar limit in magnitude.

dt.description: Output sample interval in seconds (optional, default 0.01).

limit.description: A positive scalar OR a 3-element [x, y, z] array of positive numbers.
